_comment: VIOLATION LOG: Entries 1-2 are REAL violations found in actual Week 3 data. Entries 3-5 are INTENTIONALLY INJECTED by running ValidationRunner against extractions_violated.jsonl where confidence was changed from float 0.0-1.0 to integer 0-100.
